project_type: Python CLI application - NBA Draft prediction simulator
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, no build step needed
verification_instructions:
1. pip install -r requirements.txt
2. python -m pytest tests/ -v
3. python main.py --mode backtest
4. python main.py --mode predict
snapshot_or_generated_files: output/ directory contains JSON prediction results, not checked in
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access, can scrape websites. Python 3.11.15 via pyenv. uv/pip/pytest/ruff available.
key_patterns: Single-file-per-module Python app. JSON for data storage. requests + beautifulsoup4 for scraping. Weighted consensus algorithm for aggregation.
relevant_files: scrapers/ - web scraping modules per source
directory_structure:
/projects/sandbox/nba-draft-demo/ - project root
  main.py - CLI entry point
  config.py - configuration and weights
  models.py - data classes
  aggregator.py - consensus engine
  backtest.py - validation against 2024 data
  scrapers/ - one module per source
  data/ - historical/cached data (JSON)
  output/ - generated predictions
  tests/ - pytest test suite
